purpose: Repo-local OS Abyss artifact bundle input for generated/agent_registry.min.json.

consumer_contract.stable_interface: python scripts/validate_abyss_machine_role_registry_bundle.py --json and abyss-machine artifacts trust-gate --artifact-class role_contract_registry --consumer-intent agent --json
consumer_contract.consumer_expectation: Agent-layer consumers select a role_contract_registry bundle from the registry latest read-model only after ABI verification, SLSA/in-toto generation provenance, materialized subject-store verification, build_published_surfaces parity, validate_agents, role-boundary checks, and consumer trust-gate allow/warn succeeds.

consumer_command: abyss-machine artifacts evidence-promote BUNDLE_DIR --registry-dir REGISTRY_DIR --lifecycle-state release-ready --consumer-ref aoa-agents:role-contract-registry --evidence-ref BUNDLE_DIR/artifact.verify.json --source-repo aoa-agents --source-ref manifests/artifact_bundles/role_contract_registry.bundle.json --producer aoa-agents-role-registry-builder --trust-root-mode host_managed --json

abyss-machine artifacts materialize-subjects BUNDLE_DIR --registry-dir REGISTRY_DIR --manifest manifests/artifact_bundles/role_contract_registry.bundle.json --consumer-intent agent --source-repo aoa-agents --trust-root-mode host_managed --json
abyss-machine artifacts trust-gate --registry-dir REGISTRY_DIR --artifact-class role_contract_registry --consumer-intent agent --source-repo aoa-agents --trust-root-mode host_managed --json
abyss-machine artifacts registry-latest --registry-dir REGISTRY_DIR --artifact-class role_contract_registry --consumer-intent agent --source-repo aoa-agents --trust-root-mode host_managed --json
